next_experiment: Enumerate the projected core under one fixed Weil normalization and require interval-certified sign or a strict negative witness.
claim_boundary: No conjecture proof and no certified conjecture counterexample.
proof_boundary: This closes the two-moment admissibility defect of the enumerable core. It proves neither Weil positivity on that core nor RH, and it does not replace the need to freeze one exact published normalization.
